lines: dec StLSke.gs Mem.k c <> None<:nonce * associated_data * bytes>] =
dec RO.m Mem.k c <> None<:nonce * associated_data * bytes>]
&hr: {forged, b : bool, i : int, n : nonce, ns : nonce list,
x : nonce * C.counter, r : poly_in, s : poly_out, bl : block}
hns: ns{hr} = undup (map (fun (p : ciphertext) => p.`1) Mem.lc{hr})
dec RO.m{hr} Mem.k{hr} c <> None<:nonce * associated_data * bytes> =>
hdec: dec RO.m{hr} Mem.k{hr} c <> None<:nonce * associated_data * bytes>
rcons (take i{hr} ns{hr}) (nth witness<:nonce> ns{hr} i{hr})
hc1: c.`1 = nth witness<:nonce> ns{hr} i{hr}

visible_destructors.effect: Exposes a preimage term for a mapped membership source.
visible_destructors.limitations: The concrete preimage name depends on the local proof context.

visible_destructors.effect: Carries both source membership and the filter predicate fact.
visible_destructors.limitations: Predicate simplification is left to checked local proof steps.

membership_decomposition_surface.effect: Summarizes list/map/filter membership sources whose local case facts are visible in the current pure tail.
limitations: No destructor tactic is chosen by this surface.
The panel does not assume which membership branch is true.

candidate_sources.why_visible: A visible membership fact binds this member term.
A visible membership fact binds this member term.

existential_witness_surface.effect: Lists verifier-visible term sources that can instantiate local existentials in the pure tail.
limitations: No witness is selected by this surface.
Candidate terms may still require local equality or membership facts.

key_cases.evidence: No equality/projection path to an update key is visible in this goal text.

map_update_lookup_surface.effect: Summarizes finite-map update and lookup keys that determine same-key versus different-key local obligations.
limitations: This surface does not perform a rewrite or case split.
A key case marked unresolved only means no equality path is visible in this goal text.

gap_analysis.gap: Visible membership sources carry local case facts that can expose the key, projection, or witness relation, but those source facts are not separated in the current context.

inspect_lookup_handles.effect: All handles here are read-only manager requests; the committed EasyCrypt proof state stays unchanged.
